entry.title: Talk less, Smile more
entry.summary:
Author: Kxk

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,279Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: He felt awful, he knew he'd clawed up Ravi and Athena quite a bit and probably shouted some stuff he'd never meant to say but can you blame him? An hour ago he was planning to make it through this evening, one last evening before he ended it all, but Bobby ruined that plan. But he also fixed him. Or, Buck learns what it means to be loved.

entry.title: Wrapped In Your Warmth
entry.summary:
Author: tomatosoupforthesoul

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,362Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: "He shifts slightly, cheek dragging across fabric that smells clean and familiar. Detergent, sure, but underneath it something warmer. Soap and skin, something cedar and citrus, maybe a hint of something acidic. Coffee? He curls into it further, like he can inhale it into the very core of himself. The scent hits his chest first, loosening something there before his mind is awake enough to ask why it matters. Why that scent feels familiar..."Or, Buck wakes up to something a little bit more than he expected in his best friend's bed.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Time in a bottle
entry.summary:
Author: DaniWib

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,744Chapters: 2/7Kudos: 57

Summary: After the failed intervention at Athena's house, Buck fled, his disbelief quickly swallowed by a rising tide of fury. Hen’s rant about no one caring echoed in his ears, each word piercing deep until his vision burned red. No one cared? No one? He had cared! He had tried to hold everyone together, checking in, reaching out, desperately trying to stop the 118 from falling apart. But they made it clear Buck's efforts weren’t wanted, weren’t needed, or in Hen’s case, didn’t even count. Just when Buck’s hurt and anger finally overflowed, he encountered someone with the power to change it all. A crossroads demon. [Fic is complete, chapters posted weekly Friday & Tuesday nights AEST]

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Your Love is My Drug
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,146Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 141

Summary: Buck knows it’s not sustainable by the fourth night, when he wakes up sweating and unable to breathe, one hand clutching his ribs where she’d stuck him the first time with the cattle prod and the other reaching to turn on the lamp at his bedside. It’s been one week since he got back, so four sleepless nights puts him firmly in the "more bad than good" territory. What the hell is he supposed to do about all this shit? He alluded to therapy when he talked with Eddie at work the other day, but he’s not going to do that. Therapy is totally hit or miss for him. He’s been to two therapists, one was a miss, one a hit, which means he’s due for another miss. He’s sure as hell not going to talk to Maddie about it, because that’d be, like, super triggering or something. She just got over her own kidnapping a few years ago. And who else, Eddie? Eddie had a traumatic experience in New Mexico as well; he doesn’t need to be responsible for Buck’s too. But the fact of the matter is, something’s got to change. So, Buck decides to start self-medicating. ~ or canon compliant up until s9ep14 (DIY), after that it's just angst and hurt and maybe occasional comfort

entry.title: Still Here (But Almost Wasn't)
entry.summary:
Author: mamoo100620

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,659Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 63

Summary: It was his day off, Buck was heading out for lunch with Maddie when a devastating highway pile-up changes everything. Trapped, injured, and fading, he makes one call—unaware that Station 118 is already on its way. But when the team arrives, they realize the unthinkable: Buck is one of the victims.

entry.title: you're a ghost, and i choke
entry.summary:
Author: aurumwrites

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,240Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 16

Summary: "Buck knew it was wrong; he knew this should be used for the people he swore to save. But as he held the vial in his hand, a thought crossed his mind: he deserved to be saved, too. And this tempting drug was whispering empty promises, urging him to shove it in his pocket and walk away as if nothing had happened."   Or; The one where Buck steals drugs from the ambulance and doesn't confide in Chimney. Then, Eddie finds him.

entry.title: Heart Made of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: Princessfbi

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,096Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 223

Summary: “Mr. Diaz!” The doctor said, holding her hand up as she stepped in front of him. “Mr. Buckley came in extremely confused. I know the restraints are upsetting–” “Upsetting?” Eddie spat out, two seconds away from shoving her out of his way.  “—But they're for his and our safety.” The doctor was quick to finish as if Eddie hadn’t said anything.  “Your safety?” Eddie demanded. “He was just tied up by some psycho couple out in the desert and you’re concerned about your safety?” Things don't go as smoothly at the hospital as they should. BTHB Prompt: Kind Restraints

entry.summary:

Summary: Buck, you don’t have any kids, right?Hey Chris-No, no I don’t have any kidsWhy?Um- Well I don’t have a partner-And I don’t think I’m there yet, ChrisI think you’d be a great Dad[Spluttering]Thanks buddy-That-that means a lotI mean you’re the best Bucky ever[Quick inhale]Do you want to know something crazy?What’s crazy buddy?Octopuses have eight hearts!That is pretty-Do you know where we could see an octopus?Go ask your Dad-I can be over in tenOr.. entry.summary:
Author: Promise_Moon

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,787Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

entry.title: Sweet, sweet dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Nightskydeer

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,968Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 48

Summary: Buck has had some revelations about his life while Eddie is in Texas. Mainly? He's in love with his best friend, he wants to be his husband and the father of his child, and... he's the stereotypical queer friend who falls in love with a straight guy. How awkward. When Chris calls one day to tell him that Eddie disappeared while working as an Uber driver, he immediately flies to Texas to stay with him and, hopefully, help figure out what happened to his best friend.   Sam and Dean head to El Paso, Texas, to investigate a case linked to a series of disappearances they believe may be connected to the supernatural world. There, they meet Evan Buckley, a desperate firefighter from LA who just wants to find his partner.

entry.title: My Life as Derek
entry.summary:
Author: nfarious

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,727Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 80

Summary: After surviving a traumatic kidnapping by Bonnie and Earl, who tried to force him into the role of their brain-dead son Derek, Evan "Buck" Buckley convinces himself the ordeal is behind him and skips therapy. On his way home from the station late at night, he is violently ambushed and abducted again—this time by an unseen captor wearing a grotesque Halloween mask. He awakens with a splitting headache inside an enormous, twisted adult-sized "nursery" painted in pastel blue, with giant block letters on the wall reading **DEREK’S NURSERY**. The room is a nightmarish blend of infantilizing comfort and dungeon-like control: oversized crib with steel bars, massive changing table with restraints, shelves of thick printed diapers, a playpen, and a huge rocking chair. Buck realizes his ordeal isn't over and that someone else wants him to be Derek. Question now is who and why?

entry.title: The Hermit, the Devil, and the Star
entry.summary:
Author: thetalee

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 100,390Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 444

Summary: Buck is back at the 118, and Eddie's healed from the sniper, but that doesn't mean everything's rainbows and unicorns. He knows there's something wrong with Maddie, no matter how many times she and Chimney say everything's fine. He knows there's something wrong with Eddie, even if his boyfriend insists otherwise. At least everything seems to be okay with Daniel, this time.

  • Protective Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Canon-Typical Violence
  • Alternate Universe
  • Non-Linear Narrative
  • No beta was harmed in the making of this fic

entry.title: Something Broke In Me (And I Wanted To Go Home)
entry.summary:
Author: stolen_pen_name23

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,189Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 514

Summary: “Did you hear me calling for you?” Eddie asks, unable to hide the mounting desperation — the slight quiver — in the rasp of his voice. “Yes,” Buck answers. He drops his eyes to the dusty ground. “Then why?” Eddie hates the way it sounds like begging as the question leaves his lips. Buck pinches the bridge of his nose and winces as if he forgot about the bruises he has there. “You know, that’s the third time I’ve had to listen to a gun go off without having my eyes on you,” Buck says. “The third time I’ve heard a gunshot, knowing you were there, and had this sinking feeling that it was you who took the bullet.” Buck looks down and shakes his head. With a humorless chuckle, he murmurs, “Again.” ***OR: On the drive back to LA, Eddie asks Buck why he didn’t call out for him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
